ab: O maan ko saka tayni iso?
en: A: How did you get here?

ab: Romakat kako a tayni.
en: I came on foot.

ab: O maan ko pikalican iso a tayni?
Pakapaso kako a tayni.
en: B: I came by bus.

ab: Maanen iso a tayra i kiwkay?
en: A: How do you go to church?

ab: Padakawen no mama to tosiya kako a malacecay a tayra.
en: B: Dad drove me with him.

ab: Maanen ningra a tala pitilidan to hatiniay?
en: A: How does he usually go to school?

ab: Midakaw cingra to ciyon a tayra pitilidan.
en: B: He took the subway to school.

ab: Maanen no mamo iso a micakay to dateng?
en: A: How does your grandmother go to the grocery store?

ab: Pakaotopay cingra a micakay to dateng.
en: B: She went to the grocery store on a motorcycle.

ab: Maanen iso a tayra i Fotod?
en: A: How are you going to get to Orchid Island?

ab: Pakatamina kako a tayra i Fotod.
en: B: I want to take a boat to Lanyu.

ab: Pakamaan cingra a tayra i Fotod?
en: A: How did he get to Orchid Island?

ab: Pakahikoki cingra a tayra i Fotod.
en: B: He took a plane to Orchid Island.

ab: O maan ko midakawan ningra a tayra i Takaw?
en: A: What bus did he take to Kaohsiung?

ab: Pakakawtiy cingra a tayra i Takaw.
en: B: He took the THSR to Kaohsiung.

ab: Pakacinamalay cingra a tayra i Pusong haw?
en: A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: Hai, pakacinamalay cingra a tayra i Pusong.
en: B: Yes, he took a train to Taitung.

ab: Pakacinamalay cingra a tayra i Pusong haw?
en: A: Did he take a train to Taitung?

ab: Caay, pakahikoki cingra a tayra i Pusong.
en: B: No, he took a plane to Taitung.

ab: I ngata noni, iraay ko pidakawan to paso a siyataw haw?
en: A: Is there a bus stop near here?

ab: Iraay, tala’ayaw han ko rakat, ma’arawto ko saytaw no paso.
ch: B:有，往前走就會看到公車站了。
en: B: Yes, if you go straight ahead, you will see the bus stop.

ab: Icowaay ko sangataay a siyataw no ciyon itini?
ch: A:離這裡最近的捷運站在哪裡?
en: A: Where is the nearest MRT station?

ab: Awaay ko siyataw no ciyon itini, deng pipakahayya iso.
ch: B:這裡沒有捷運站，你只能坐計程車。
en: B: There is no MRT station here, you can only take a taxi.

ab: Midakaw to paso, hakowa ko halafin tahira i pitilidan?
en: A:How long does it take to get to the school by bus?

ab: Safaw lima a fen tahira to i pitilidan.
en: B:15 minutes to school.

ab: Pakakawtiy hakowa ko halafin tahira to i Tayciw?
ch: A:搭高鐵要多久時間會到臺中?
en: A: How long does it take to get to Taichung by THSR?

ab: Cecay a tatokian tahira to i Tayciw.
en: B: I will come to Taichung in an hour.

ab: Pakapaliding hakowa ko halafin a tahira i Olay?
en: A: Is it a long drive to Ulai?

ab: Latek cecay ko tatokian.
en: B: It takes about an hour.

ab: Pakaciyon kiso a tayni i loma’ ako, hakowa ko halafin?
ch: A:你搭捷運來我家要多久?
en: A: How long did it take you to come to my house by subway?

ab: Pakaala to tosa polo’ a fen.
en: B: It takes 20 minutes.

ab: Mafana’ kiso a mikoliciw haw?
en: A: Do you know how to ride a bicycle?

ab: Mafana’ kako a mikoliciw.
en: B: I can ride a bicycle.

ab: Iraay ko otopay iso haw?
en: A: Do you have a motorcycle?

ab: Iraay ko cecay a otopay ako.
en: B: I have a motorcycle.

ab: Iraay ko otopay iso haw?
en: A: Do you have a motorcycle?

ab: Awaay ko otopay ako.
en: B: I don't have a motorcycle.
